aepedia-desc: School wiki management: membership in a school's parent list controls registration and page access.
aepedia-groups-intro: Select a school and upload a CSV containing all parent emails. This entirely replaces the current parent list for that school. Parents not in the new list will have the group removed from their account immediately. If they no longer belong to any school's parent list, their account will be blocked.
aepedia-groups-csv-label: CSV content — one email per line, header row ignored:
aepedia-groups-confirm: This will replace the entire membership for the selected group. Continue?
aepedia-groups-success: Group $1 updated: $2 member(s) added, $3 member(s) removed. $4 account(s) blocked, $5 account(s) unblocked.
aepedia-groups-error-empty: No valid email addresses found in the CSV.
aepedia-csv-columns-hint: Select one or more columns that contain email addresses.
aepedia-csv-filter-hint: Rows matching any filter will be excluded from the import.
